description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular body and four evenly spaced drawers. The exterior is finished in a dark, matte color, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban interiors or public spaces. The drawers are handleless, with subtle horizontal grooves indicating their separation and providing a clean, uninterrupted facade. The chest stands on slender, metal legs that slightly elevate it off the ground, adding to its modern aesthetic and making cleaning underneath easier. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with metal used for the legs and internal drawer mechanisms. There are no visible decorative embellishments, locks, or branding, emphasizing its utilitarian and streamlined style.
description: A modern, dark-colored chest of drawers with four handleless drawers and slim metal legs, featuring a minimalist and functional design. Its clean lines and matte finish make it suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing four horizontal drawers with no visible handles, and slim metal legs supporting the structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the chest's depth, flat side panels, and the thin profile of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel and the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flat side and leg structure.
